title: [DISCONTINUED]rodbobez's Family Friendly Modpack
description: I made this for me and my friends, but there's superheroes, new dimensions, scary stuff, and not so scary stuff!
body:
**SUPERHERO METALS DO CURRENTLY SPAWN, THEY'RE JUST CRAY-Z RARE**
There will be an update to fix that I swaer! -i lied, i'm not updating this anymore


I made this modpack for me and my friends, but if you decide to play:

Explore a pretty Vanilla landscape, but ofcourse you might run into a new dimension or a revamped dungeon. You might even end up finding the moon God, that is IF you can see in the moonlight.

Every moon stage illuminates the world differently, with a full moon being the brightest and a new moon being pitch black. And ofcourse, you cannot see in caves without bringing a night source (or preferably some night vision). This isn't nessesarily a horror mod, but there are some elements added to give an eerie vibe if you're alone.

Luckily there's mutants, but unluckily there are mutanants in your world. If you want to avoid the mutants, fly into the stars and if you have just the right power you won't even need a ship!

i'm gonna add more scary stuff maybe, but version 1.0.3 SHOULD be playable without any major issues!
